supertrend.label: Supertrend
supertrend.note: Trend-following line. Reliable in trending markets, whipsaws in chop.

ema_stack.label: EMA Stack (20/50/200)
ema_stack.note: Whether short/mid/slow EMAs are stacked bullish or bearish.

ema_price.label: Price vs EMA 50
ema_price.note: Is price above or below the medium EMA? Simple buyer/seller control.

rsi.label: RSI
rsi.note: Momentum oscillator. Useful for spotting exhaustion at extremes.

stoch_rsi.label: Stoch RSI
stoch_rsi.note: Fast momentum cross. Noisy but catches short-term reversals early.

macd.label: MACD
macd.note: Trend + momentum combined. Less noisy than Stoch RSI.

obv.label: OBV vs OBV EMA
obv.note: Is smart money accumulating or distributing?

obv_leading.label: OBV Leading Accumulation
obv_leading.note: OBV rising while price is flat = buying before the move. PRE-SIGNAL ancestor.

bb_slow.label: BB Slow (20 SMA / close / 2σ)
bb_slow.note: Standard Bollinger Band. Price at bands signals potential reversals.

bb_fast.label: BB Fast (4 SMA / open / 2σ)
bb_fast.note: Short-term volatility envelope. Dual-band position reveals momentum quality.

vwap.label: VWAP
vwap.note: Fair value anchor. Institutions use this as buy/sell reference.

supertrend.label: Supertrend
supertrend.note: Trend-following line. Reliable in trending markets, whipsaws in chop.

ema_stack.label: EMA Stack (20/50/200)
ema_stack.note: Whether short/mid/slow EMAs are stacked bullish or bearish.

ema_price.label: Price vs EMA 50
ema_price.note: Is price above or below the medium EMA? Simple buyer/seller control.

rsi.label: RSI

stoch_rsi.label: Stoch RSI

macd.label: MACD

obv.label: OBV vs OBV EMA
obv.note: Is smart money accumulating or distributing?

obv_leading.label: OBV Leading Accumulation
obv_leading.note: OBV rising while price is flat = buying before the move. PRE-SIGNAL ancestor.

bb_slow.label: BB Slow (20 SMA / close / 2σ)
bb_slow.note: Standard Bollinger Band. Price at bands signals potential reversals.

bb_fast.label: BB Fast (4 SMA / open / 2σ)
bb_fast.note: Short-term volatility envelope. Dual-band position reveals momentum quality.

vwap.label: VWAP
vwap.note: Fair value anchor. Institutions use this as buy/sell reference.

mfi.label: MFI (Money Flow Index)
mfi.note: Volume-weighted RSI. Catches institutional accumulation before price moves. Overbought=80, Oversold=20.

fisher.label: Fisher Transform
fisher.note: Normalizes price to a Gaussian distribution. Near-vertical spikes at extremes = genuine exhaustion turning points.
